name: Suspicious ScreenSaver Registry Key Set Detected
description: Detection of suspicious modification to the SCRNSAVE.EXE registry key, indicating that a file is being set as the system screensaver, often for persistence or execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the registry key was modified.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process (expected to be rundll32.exe) that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The full path to the modified registry key.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The new value set for the registry key (the path to the .scr file).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID (expected to be 13).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
